user.title: SolaxCloud API
user.description: Enter your SolaxCloud Developer Portal credentials. You can find these at https://developer.solaxcloud.com under your Application settings.

data_description.client_id: The Client ID of your SolaxCloud Developer Application.
data_description.client_secret: The Client Secret of your SolaxCloud Developer Application. Treated as a password — never shared.

reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: Re-authenticate Application **{client_id}**. Enter the new Client Secret from your SolaxCloud Developer Portal.

data_description.client_secret: The new Client Secret after rotation in the Developer Portal.
